ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你今天白天投票过，你可以选择一名玩家：他今晚不会被唤醒。[+1外来者]
otherNightReminder: If they voted today, wake them to select a player and place the *DOES NOT WAKE* reminder next to them. :reminder:
flavor: OFF WITH THEIR HEADS!!! RELEASE THE JUBJUB BIRD! You're right, Stayne, it is far better to be feared than loved.
